workbench.title: Workbench
workbench.runHint: Enter to run · Shift+Enter for newline
workbench.aplKeyHintOn: APL input is active: every key produces the glyph drawn on it. Shift gives the secondary glyph in the top-right corner. Switch to ASCII to type normally.
workbench.aplKeyHintOff: ASCII input is active: keys type their normal characters. Hold Alt and press a key to insert a single APL glyph, or switch the toggle above to APL.
workbench.inputModeTitle: Toggle between APL and ASCII input

glyphs.title: Glyph reference
glyphs.intro: Every symbol carries two meanings: one alone (monadic), one between two values (dyadic).

exercises.title: Hands-on exercises
exercises.intro: Each problem is paired with a worked APL solution. Many admit more than one; one is shown.

guardian.pasteBlocked: Paste disabled. Type APL by hand.
guardian.rateLimited: Too many runs. Wait a minute.
